message:
style(ops): collapse single-expression match arm in map_event

Reformat the catch-all arm in map_event (Focus/Paste/Clipboard/Tick
variants) from a block-style "{ None }" to inline "=> None," since
the body is a single trivial expression. This matches rustfmt's
preferred style for simple match arms.

No behavioral changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
